summary: Comprehensive testing of Ecoandes e-commerce platform completed. All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend smoke tests passed for all key pages and flows.

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in price logs table

action_items: Minor: Fix React key warning in AdminPriceImport.jsx price logs table (line ~115)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good overall with proper separation of concerns
All admin routes properly protected with require_admin dependency
Dual pricing logic correctly implemented for guest vs professional users
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
Stripe integration working correctly with emergentintegrations library
PayPal and Cloudinary correctly return 400 when not configured

test_credentials.test_retail: Created during tests with random emails
test_credentials.test_professional: Created during tests with random emails

seed_data_creation: 187 products seeded from WordPress XML, admin user auto-created on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend pages load and function properly. Cart, checkout, and admin flows all operational. Stripe checkout creates sessions successfully. PayPal returns expected 400 when not configured. Price import Excel functionality verified with HAVEI20 SKU update visible in logs.
